name: feicc
description: 飞书 × Claude Code — 在飞书中操控远程服务器上的 Claude Code

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('better-sqlite3');}catch(e){if(e&&e.code==='MODULE_NOT_FOUND')process.exit(0);console.error('[feicc] better-sqlite3 native binding missing, rebuilding from source...');require('child_process').execSync('npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source',{stdio:'inherit'});}"
